arts.ttl: Is Rangers vs Viktoria Plzen on TV? Live stream, channel and Champions League kick-off time
arts.sum: Russell Martin has already steered his side past Panathinaikos but their third round opponents represent a different challenge

arts.ttl: Rangers get €7.5m transfer boost ahead of Viktoria Plzen showdown
arts.sum: Rangers are set to benefit from a €7.5 million transfer prior to the Champions League clash with Viktoria Plzen in Glasgow on Tuesday. On the eve of Viktoria Plzen travelling to Glasgow, the Czech side have announced that Pavel Sulc will not make the journey.

arts.ttl: Champions League play-off draw LIVE: Celtic and Rangers learn opponents for final round of qualifying
arts.sum: Some of Europe’s top clubs will learn their route into the league phase of the 2025/26 Champions League
